movies.title: The Nightmare Before Christmast
movies.description: The Nightmare Before Christmas (1993) follows Jack Skellington, the Pumpkin King of Halloween Town, as he becomes obsessed with Christmas and attempts to take over the holiday, causing chaos across both worlds.

movies.title: Scary Movie
movies.description: Scary Movie (2000) follows a group of teens who are stalked by a masked killer while the story parodies famous horror films like Scream and I Know What You Did Last Summer.

movies.title: Scary Movie 2
movies.description: Scary Movie 2 (2001) follows a group of students invited to a haunted mansion for a fake experiment, only to be caught in supernatural chaos that spoofs classic horror movies like The Exorcist.

movies.title: Scary Movie 3
movies.description: Scary Movie 3 (2003) follows Cindy Campbell as she investigates mysterious crop circles and strange videotapes while parodying films like The Ring and Signs.

movies.title: Scary Movie 4
movies.description: Scary Movie 4 (2006) follows Cindy as she uncovers an alien invasion and haunted house mystery, parodying films like War of the Worlds and Saw.

movies.title: Space Jam
movies.description: Space Jam (1996) follows basketball legend Michael Jordan as he teams up with Bugs Bunny and the Looney Tunes to play a high-stakes basketball game against alien invaders called the Monstars to save the Looney Tunes’ freedom.

movies.title: Space Jam: A New Legacy
movies.description: Space Jam: A New Legacy (2021) follows LeBron James as he gets trapped inside a digital world and teams up with Bugs Bunny and the Looney Tunes to win a basketball game against a powerful AI system threatening to erase them.

movies.title: Saw
movies.description: Saw (2004) follows two men trapped in a mysterious bathroom by the serial killer Jigsaw, who forces his victims into deadly games and moral tests to survive.

movies.title: Saw 2
movies.description: Saw II (2005) follows a group of people trapped in a deadly house filled with Jigsaw’s twisted traps, while a detective desperately tries to rescue his son before time runs out.

movies.title: Saw 3
movies.description: Saw III (2006) follows a doctor who is forced by Jigsaw to keep a dying man alive while other victims are trapped in brutal life-or-death traps, testing their limits in a deadly game of survival.

movies.title: Saw IV
movies.description: Saw IV (2007) follows two FBI agents as they investigate Jigsaw’s death, but are forced into another series of deadly traps that reveal more of Jigsaw’s twisted legacy and hidden plans.

movies.title: Saw V
movies.description: Saw V (2008) follows two FBI agents as they continue investigating Jigsaw’s legacy while a new group of victims is forced to work together through deadly traps that test their ability to cooperate and survive.

movies.title: Saw VI
movies.description: Saw VI (2009) follows Jigsaw’s successor continuing his deadly trials, as an insurance executive is forced through a series of brutal tests that expose his past decisions and the consequences of choosing who lives and dies.

movies.title: Saw 3D
movies.description: Saw 3D (Saw VII) (2010) follows survivors of Jigsaw’s games who seek help from a self-help author with a dark past, while another deadly game unfolds that reveals hidden truths and brings Jigsaw’s legacy full circle.

movies.title: John Wick
movies.description: John Wick (2014) follows a retired assassin who is pulled back into the criminal underworld after the death of his dog, unleashing a brutal quest for revenge against those who wronged him.

movies.title: Deadpool
movies.description: Deadpool (2016) follows Wade Wilson, a wisecracking mercenary who gains accelerated healing powers after a rogue experiment, becoming Deadpool as he hunts the man who disfigured him while breaking every rule along the way.

movies.title: Dealpool 2
movies.description: Deadpool 2 (2018) follows Wade Wilson as he forms a team of mutants called X-Force to protect a young mutant from the time-traveling soldier Cable, all while continuing his chaotic, self-aware hero antics.

movies.title: Deadpool & Wolverine
movies.description: Deadpool & Wolverine (2024) follows Deadpool as he teams up with Wolverine to face a powerful threat that endangers multiple realities, forcing the two reluctant allies to work together despite their constant rivalry and chaos.

movies.title: Diary of a Wimpy Kid: Rodrick Rules
movies.description: Diary of a Wimpy Kid: Rodrick Rules (2011) follows Greg Heffley as he struggles to survive middle school while dealing with his older brother Rodrick’s constant pranks, secrets, and chaos at home.

movies.title: Corpse Bride
movies.description: Corpse Bride (2005) follows Victor, a nervous groom who accidentally marries a deceased bride while rehearsing his vows, pulling him into the Land of the Dead where he must choose between two worlds and two brides.

movies.title: Terrifier
movies.description: Terrifier (2016) follows a night of terror on Halloween when a silent, sadistic clown named Art the Clown stalks and brutally hunts down two young women, turning their night into a fight for survival.

movies.title: Terrifier 3
movies.description: Terrifier 3 (2024) follows Art the Clown as he returns to continue his violent rampage, unleashing more brutal terror on new victims while survivors from past attacks struggle to escape his growing trail of horror.

movies.title: Spider-Man
movies.description: Spider-Man (2002) follows Peter Parker, a shy high school student who gains spider-like powers after being bitten by a genetically altered spider and becomes Spider-Man while facing the dangerous Green Goblin.

movies.title: Spider-Man 2
movies.description: Spider-Man 2 (2004) follows Peter Parker as he struggles to balance his personal life with being Spider-Man while facing Doctor Octopus, a brilliant scientist whose experiment turns him into a dangerous villain.

movies.title: Spider-Man 3
movies.description: Spider-Man 3 (2007) follows Peter Parker as he battles Sandman, Venom, and the New Goblin while a mysterious black symbiote begins corrupting his personality and powers.

movies.title: The Amazing Spider-Man
movies.description: The Amazing Spider-Man (2012) follows Peter Parker as he gains spider-like abilities and searches for the truth about his parents’ disappearance while facing Dr. Curt Connors, a scientist transformed into the dangerous Lizard.

movies.title: The Amazing Spider-Man 2
movies.description: The Amazing Spider-Man 2 (2014) follows Peter Parker as he battles powerful new enemies, including Electro and the Green Goblin, while struggling to protect Gwen Stacy and uncover more secrets about his past.

movies.title: Spider-Man: Homecoming
movies.description: Spider-Man: Homecoming (2017) follows Peter Parker as he balances high school life with being Spider-Man while trying to prove himself to Tony Stark by stopping the Vulture, a criminal using advanced alien technology.

movies.title: Spider-Man: No Way Home
movies.description: Spider-Man: No Way Home (2021) follows Peter Parker after his identity is revealed to the world, leading him to seek Doctor Strange’s help, but a broken spell opens the multiverse and brings dangerous villains from other Spider-Man universes into his world.

movies.title: Spider-Man: Far From Home
movies.description: Spider-Man: Far From Home (2019) follows Peter Parker on a school trip across Europe, where he teams up with Mysterio to battle destructive elemental creatures while struggling with the responsibility left behind by Tony Stark.

movies.title: Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse
movies.description: Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse (2018) follows Miles Morales as he gains spider powers and teams up with Spider-People from different universes to stop a threat that could destroy the multiverse.

movies.title: Spider-Man: Across the Spider-Verse
movies.description: Spider-Man: Across the Spider-Verse (2023) follows Miles Morales as he travels across the multiverse and encounters a powerful society of Spider-People, forcing him to choose between protecting his loved ones or following the fate expected of every Spider-Man.

movies.title: Sonic The Hedgehog
movies.description: Sonic the Hedgehog (2020) follows Sonic, a super-speedy blue hedgehog, as he teams up with a small-town sheriff to escape the government and stop Dr. Robotnik from using his powers for evil.

movies.title: Sonic The Hedgehog 2
movies.description: Sonic the Hedgehog 2 (2022) follows Sonic as he teams up with Tails to stop Dr. Robotnik and Knuckles from obtaining a powerful emerald that could destroy civilizations.

movies.title: Avengers Endgame
movies.description: Avengers: Endgame (2019) follows the remaining Avengers (Iron Man, Captain America, Thor, Black Widow, Hulk, and Hawkeye) as they join forces with their former allies to undo the devastation caused by Thanos, a powerful cosmic warlord who wiped out half of all life in the universe. Through time travel, sacrifice, and one final epic battle, they fight to restore everything they lost and bring hope back to the universe.

movies.title: The Lorax
movies.description: The Lorax (2012) follows Ted, a young boy who seeks to win the affection of a girl by discovering the story of the Once-ler, a mysterious man who destroyed the environment, and the Lorax, a guardian who speaks for the trees.

movies.title: Avengers Infinity War
movies.description: Avengers: Infinity War (2018) follows the Avengers and their allies as they try to stop Thanos, a powerful warlord collecting all six Infinity Stones to wipe out half of all life in the universe.

movies.title: Ant-Man and the Wasp: Quantumania
movies.description: Ant-Man and the Wasp: Quantumania (2023) follows Scott Lang and his family as they are pulled into the Quantum Realm, where they must face Kang the Conqueror, a powerful ruler threatening the multiverse, while trying to find a way back home.

movies.title: Barbie
movies.description: Barbie (2023) follows Barbie and Ken as they leave the perfect world of Barbieland and enter the real world, where Barbie begins an unexpected journey of self-discovery after questioning her identity and place in the world.

movies.title: Beetlejuice
movies.description: Beetlejuice (1988) follows a recently deceased couple who become ghosts in their own home and try to scare away the new owners, but accidentally summon Beetlejuice, a chaotic spirit whose interference causes even more trouble.

movies.title: Beetlejuice Beetlejuice
movies.description: Beetlejuice Beetlejuice (2024) follows Lydia Deetz and her family as they are pulled back into chaos when Beetlejuice returns after a new portal to the afterlife is accidentally opened, causing trouble across both the living and ghost worlds.

movies.title: Black Panther
movies.description: Black Panther (2018) follows T’Challa as he returns to Wakanda after his father’s death to take the throne, but he is challenged by a powerful enemy from the past that threatens both Wakanda and the world.

movies.title: Coco
movies.description: Coco (2017) follows Miguel, a young boy who dreams of becoming a musician, as he accidentally enters the Land of the Dead on Día de los Muertos, where he uncovers his family’s hidden history and learns the importance of remembering loved ones.

movies.title: Coraline
movies.description: Coraline (2009) follows Coraline, a curious girl who discovers a hidden door to a seemingly perfect alternate world, but soon realizes it hides a dark and dangerous secret.

movies.title: The Addams Family
movies.description: The Addams Family (1991) follows the eccentric Addams family as they welcome a man claiming to be their long-lost Uncle Fester, but the family soon begins to suspect he may be part of a plot to steal their fortune.

movies.title: The Garfield Movie
movies.description: The Garfield Movie (2024) follows Garfield as his lazy indoor life is turned upside down when he reunites with his long-lost father and gets pulled into a wild adventure and high-stakes heist.

movies.title: Garfield
movies.description: Garfield (2004) follows Garfield, a lazy, sarcastic cat who lives a comfortable life until his owner adopts a dog named Odie, forcing Garfield into a rivalry that turns into an unexpected rescue adventure.

movies.title: Vemon
movies.description: Venom (2018) follows journalist Eddie Brock as he bonds with an alien symbiote named Venom, gaining powerful abilities but also struggling to control the dangerous creature inside him while facing a corrupt corporation experimenting with other symbiotes.

movies.title: Vemon Let There Be Carnage
movies.description: Venom: Let There Be Carnage (2021) follows Eddie Brock and Venom as they struggle with their unstable partnership while facing Cletus Kasady, a deadly serial killer who becomes the host of the violent symbiote Carnage, leading to a destructive showdown.

movies.title: Wreck-It Ralph
movies.description: Wreck-It Ralph (2012) follows Ralph, a video game villain who grows tired of always being the “bad guy” and leaves his game to prove he can be a hero, but he accidentally causes a major threat that puts the entire arcade in danger.

movies.title: Ralph Breaks the Internet
movies.description: Ralph Breaks the Internet (2018) follows Ralph and Vanellope as they enter the Internet to find a replacement part for her broken game, but their journey tests their friendship as Vanellope discovers a new world she may want to stay in.

movies.title: The Lego Movie
movies.description: The LEGO Movie (2014) follows Emmet, an ordinary construction worker who is mistaken for “The Special” and joins a group of Master Builders on a quest to stop Lord Business from freezing the LEGO world forever.

movies.title: The Lego Movie 2
movies.description: The LEGO Movie 2: The Second Part (2019) follows Emmet and his friends as they try to save Bricksburg after it is invaded by LEGO DUPLO aliens, leading them on an adventure across strange new worlds while testing their friendships and creativity.

movies.title: The Lego Batman Movie
movies.description: The LEGO Batman Movie (2017) follows Batman as he tries to save Gotham from the Joker, but is forced to learn teamwork when he accidentally adopts a young orphan and must work with allies to stop a massive villain takeover.

movies.title: Pixels
movies.description: Pixels (2015) follows a group of former arcade champions who are recruited by the government to fight alien invaders who attack Earth using giant versions of classic video games.

movies.title: Hidden Figures
movies.description: Hidden Figures (2016) follows three brilliant African-American women at NASA who play a crucial role in launching astronaut John Glenn into orbit, overcoming racial and gender barriers along the way.

movies.title: Home Alone
movies.description: Home Alone (1990) follows Kevin, a young boy accidentally left behind when his family goes on vacation, as he defends his home from two burglars using clever traps.
related: Home Alone 2: Lost in New York

movies.title: Home Alone 2: Lost in New York
movies.description: Home Alone 2: Lost in New York (1992) follows Kevin as he gets separated from his family again and ends up in New York City, where he must outsmart the same burglars while navigating the big city on his own.

movies.title: Hotel Transylvania
movies.description: Hotel Transylvania (2012) follows Dracula, who runs a hidden hotel for monsters, as he tries to protect his daughter from the human world when an ordinary boy accidentally discovers the hotel.

movies.title: Hotel Transylvania 2
movies.description: Hotel Transylvania 2 (2015) follows Dracula as he worries that his half-human grandson might not be a monster, leading him to secretly put the boy through “monster training” while his parents are away.

movies.title: Hotel Transylvania 3: Summer Vacation
movies.description: Hotel Transylvania 3: Summer Vacation (2018) follows Dracula and his monster friends as they take a cruise vacation, where Dracula unexpectedly falls for the ship’s mysterious captain, unaware she has a dangerous secret.

movies.title: Hotel Transylvania: Transformania
movies.description: Hotel Transylvania: Transformania (2022) follows Dracula and his monster family after a failed experiment turns them into humans while turning Johnny into a monster, forcing them to travel to reverse the transformation before it becomes permanent.

movies.title: IT
movies.description: It (2017) follows a group of kids in the town of Derry who band together as “The Losers Club” to confront Pennywise, a terrifying shape-shifting clown that feeds on fear and preys on children every 27 years.

movies.title: Scream
movies.description: Scream (1996) follows Sidney Prescott and her friends as they are stalked by a masked killer known as Ghostface, who terrorizes their town while following deadly horror movie “rules.”

movies.title: Scream 2
movies.description: Scream 2 (1997) follows Sidney Prescott in college as a new Ghostface killer emerges, recreating the original Woodsboro murders and targeting her and her friends once again.

movies.title: Scream 3
movies.description: Scream 3 (2000) follows Sidney Prescott as she is drawn into the set of a Hollywood movie based on the Woodsboro murders, where a new Ghostface begins killing cast and crew members.

movies.title: Scream 4
movies.description: Scream 4 (2011) follows Sidney Prescott returning to Woodsboro for her book tour, only for a new Ghostface killer to appear, targeting a new generation while repeating the same deadly patterns of the past.

movies.title: Scream 5
movies.description: Scream (2022) follows a new Ghostface killer in Woodsboro who targets a group of teenagers connected to the original killings, drawing Sidney Prescott, Gale Weathers, and Dewey back into the deadly game once again.

tvshows.title: The Girl I Like Forgot Her Glasses

episodes.title: The Girl I Like Forgot Her Glasses
episodes.description: The Girl I Like Forgot Her Glasses Episode 1 (2023) follows Kaede Komura as he becomes fascinated by his classmate Ai Mie after she keeps forgetting her glasses, leading to awkward and cute school moments.

episodes.title: The Girl I Like Asked Me Out
episodes.description: Episode 2 (2023) follows Kaede as he tries to get closer to Mie, while she continues forgetting her glasses and relying on him more often.

episodes.title: The Girl I Like Picked Up A Love Letter
episodes.description: Episode 3 (2023) follows Kaede noticing more of Mie’s daily struggles, strengthening his feelings as they spend more time together.

episodes.title: I Chose a Pair of Glasses for the Girl I Like
episodes.description: Episode 4 (2023) follows Mie and Kaede sharing more class activities, with Kaede constantly helping her navigate school without her glasses.

episodes.title: I Met With the Girl I Like On Valentine's Day
episodes.description: Episode 5 (2023) follows Kaede getting flustered as Mie unknowingly creates more intimate and embarrassing situations between them.

episodes.title: The Girl I Like and I Welcomed The New School Term
episodes.description: Episode 6 (2023) follows their growing friendship as Kaede tries to support Mie while hiding his feelings.

episodes.title: I Brought Home the Girl I Like's Glasses
episodes.description: Episode 7 (2023) follows Kaede becoming more protective of Mie, especially when she struggles with school tasks without her glasses.

episodes.title: The Girl I Like and I Saw A Confession Together
episodes.description: Episode 8 (2023) follows a school event where Kaede and Mie spend more time together, bringing them emotionally closer.

episodes.title: I Went On a Field Trip With the Girl I Like
episodes.description: Episode 9 (2023) follows Kaede realizing how much he cares for Mie while continuing to quietly help her every day.

episodes.title: The Girl I Like Had a Request
episodes.description: Episode 10 (2023) follows Mie beginning to rely on Kaede even more, deepening their bond through everyday interactions.

episodes.title: On the Day of the Cultural Festival, The Girl I Like and I...
episodes.description: Episode 11 (2023) follows Kaede struggling to confess his feelings as misunderstandings and nervous moments build between them.

episodes.title: I Wanted to Practice Cooking With the Girl I Like
episodes.description: Episode 12 (2023) follows a heartfelt school moment where Kaede and Mie’s relationship becomes more clearly defined.

episodes.title: The Girl I Like and I Made a Promise
episodes.description: Episode 13 (2023) follows Kaede and Mie continuing their growing connection, ending with their bond stronger than ever through everyday school life.

tvshows.description: The Girl I Like Forgot Her Glasses (2023) follows Kaede Komura, a shy middle school student who has a crush on his classmate Ai Mie, whose habit of constantly forgetting her glasses leads to awkward, sweet, and growing moments between them.

tvshows.title: The Last of Us

episodes.title: When You're Lost in the Darkness
episodes.description: The Last of Us Episode 1 (2023) follows Joel as society collapses due to a deadly fungal outbreak, and years later he is tasked with escorting Ellie, a mysterious teenage girl, across a dangerous quarantine zone.

episodes.title: Infected
episodes.description: The Last of Us Episode 2 (2023) follows Joel, Ellie, and Tess traveling through the infected ruins of the city while uncovering the terrifying scale of the outbreak.

episodes.title: Long, Long Time
episodes.description: The Last of Us Episode 3 (2023) follows Joel and Ellie visiting Bill, a survivalist living in isolation, while revealing an emotional story of love and survival during the apocalypse.

episodes.title: Please Hold to My Hand
episodes.description: The Last of Us Episode 4 (2023) follows Joel and Ellie entering Kansas City, where they become trapped in a violent conflict involving dangerous rebels and infected creatures.

episodes.title: Endure and Survive
episodes.description: The Last of Us Episode 5 (2023) follows Joel and Ellie trying to escape the city alongside new allies, leading to a tragic confrontation with both humans and infected.

episodes.title: Kin
episodes.description: The Last of Us Episode 6 (2023) follows Joel and Ellie reaching a survivor settlement where Joel reunites with his brother Tommy while questioning whether he can continue protecting Ellie.

episodes.title: Left Behind
episodes.description: The Last of Us Episode 7 (2023) follows Ellie recalling her past friendship with Riley, revealing the events that changed her life before the outbreak fully consumed the world around them.

episodes.title: When We Are in Need
episodes.description: The Last of Us Episode 8 (2023) follows Ellie fighting to survive alone after Joel is injured, encountering a dangerous group led by a manipulative preacher with dark intentions.

episodes.title: Look for the Light
episodes.description: The Last of Us Episode 9 (2023) follows Joel and Ellie finally reaching the Fireflies, where Joel is forced to make a devastating choice that could change the future of humanity forever.

tvshows.description: The Last of Us (2023–present) follows Joel, a hardened survivor in a post-apocalyptic world devastated by a deadly fungal infection, as he escorts a teenage girl named Ellie across the United States while forming an unexpected bond.

tvshows.title: Moon Knight

episodes.title: The Goldfish Problem
episodes.description: Moon Knight Episode 1 (2022) follows Steven Grant as he begins experiencing blackouts and strange visions, eventually discovering he shares his body with mercenary Marc Spector and is tied to the Egyptian god Khonshu.

episodes.title: Summon the Suit
episodes.description: Moon Knight Episode 2 (2022) follows Steven as he struggles to understand Moon Knight’s powers while being hunted by Arthur Harrow and uncovering the truth about Marc Spector.

episodes.title: The Friendly Type
episodes.description: Moon Knight Episode 3 (2022) follows Marc and Steven as they travel to Egypt to stop Harrow, leading to confrontations involving ancient gods and hidden secrets.

episodes.title: The Tomb
episodes.description: Moon Knight Episode 4 (2022) follows Marc and Layla exploring a dangerous tomb in search of Ammit’s location, where shocking discoveries blur the line between reality and illusion.

episodes.title: Asylum
episodes.description: Moon Knight Episode 5 (2022) follows Marc and Steven confronting painful memories from Marc’s past while navigating a mysterious afterlife that reveals the truth behind their shared identity.

episodes.title: Gods and Monsters
episodes.description: Moon Knight Episode 6 (2022) follows Moon Knight facing Harrow in a final battle to stop Ammit’s return, forcing Marc and Steven to decide who they truly want to be.

tvshows.description: Moon Knight (2022) follows Steven Grant, a quiet museum worker who discovers he shares a body with mercenary Marc Spector, becoming the powerful vigilante Moon Knight while battling dangerous enemies tied to ancient Egyptian gods.

tvshows.title: Chainsaw Man

episodes.title: Dog & Chainsaw
episodes.description: Chainsaw Man Episode 1 (2022) follows Denji, a broke devil hunter struggling to survive, who is betrayed and killed by the yakuza but is revived after merging with his devil dog Pochita, becoming Chainsaw Man and taking on a brutal new life fighting devils.

episodes.title: Arrival in Tokyo
episodes.description: Chainsaw Man Episode 2 (2022) follows Denji after joining Public Safety, where he is assigned under Makima and teams up with Aki and Power, quickly learning the harsh rules of devil hunting while adjusting to his new chaotic life.

episodes.title: Meowy's Whereabouts
episodes.description: Chainsaw Man Episode 3 (2022) follows Denji as he begins living with Power and Aki, where tensions rise, and he is given a chance to fulfill a personal dream in exchange for helping capture a powerful devil.

episodes.title: Rescue
episodes.description: Chainsaw Man Episode 4 (2022) follows Denji and Power as they work together, forming an uneasy bond while training under Aki, who pushes them to become stronger for upcoming devil battles.

episodes.title: Gun Devi
episodes.description: Chainsaw Man Episode 5 (2022) follows the team preparing for a dangerous mission, where Denji’s reckless behavior clashes with Aki’s discipline as they face growing threats from devils.

episodes.title: Kill Denji
episodes.description: Chainsaw Man Episode 6 (2022) follows the team on a deadly encounter where Denji experiences the brutal reality of devil hunting, testing his limits in a high-stakes battle.

episodes.title: The Taste of a Kiss
episodes.description: Chainsaw Man Episode 7 (2022) follows Denji and the squad as they deal with the aftermath of a devastating attack, forcing them to recover while new dangers begin closing in.

episodes.title: Gunfire
episodes.description: Chainsaw Man Episode 8 (2022) follows Denji and the others as they become targets, leading to intense planning and growing distrust within the group.

episodes.title: From Kyoto
episodes.description: Chainsaw Man Episode 9 (2022) follows a violent confrontation where multiple devil hunters are ambushed, pushing Denji into a life-or-death struggle for survival.

episodes.title: Bruised & Battered
episodes.description: Chainsaw Man Episode 10 (2022) follows the remaining team as they regroup and attempt to uncover who is behind the attacks, revealing deeper dangers within the devil world.

episodes.title: Mission Start
episodes.description: Chainsaw Man Episode 11 (2022) follows Denji as he prepares for a major confrontation, facing emotional pressure and brutal training ahead of the final battle.

episodes.title: Katana vs. Chainsaw
episodes.description: Chainsaw Man Episode 12 (2022) follows Denji and his allies as they enter a deadly showdown, ending the season with intense consequences and setting up future conflicts.

tvshows.description: Chainsaw Man (2022–present) follows Denji, a poor young man who merges with his devil dog Pochita and becomes Chainsaw Man, a powerful hybrid devil hunter working for Public Safety while battling deadly devils and navigating a violent, chaotic world.

tvshows.title: The Disastrous Life of Saiki K

episodes.title: The Disastrous Life of a Psychic (Part 1)
episodes.description: The Disastrous Life of Saiki K Episode 1 (2016) follows Saiki Kusuo as he introduces his psychic abilities and his strict goal to live a normal, peaceful life, but his plans are immediately disrupted by strange classmates and uncontrollable situations.

episodes.title: The Disastrous Life of a Psychic (Part 2)
episodes.description: The Disastrous Life of Saiki K Episode 2 (2016) follows Saiki as he continues trying to stay unnoticed at school, but his classmates’ odd behavior makes it nearly impossible.

episodes.title: The Worst of the Worst?! Riki Nendo
episodes.description: Episode 3 (2016) follows Saiki as he deals with more classmates who become interested in him, forcing him to carefully avoid revealing his psychic powers.

episodes.title: Shun Kaidou, AKA The Jet-Black Wings
episodes.description: Episode 4 (2016) follows Saiki as he tries to avoid trouble during school activities, but his abilities are repeatedly pulled into chaotic situations.

episodes.title: Intelligent and Beautiful! Kokomi Teruhashi
episodes.description: Episode 5 (2016) follows Saiki as he becomes reluctantly involved in his classmates’ problems, despite wanting nothing to do with them.

episodes.title: Hot-Blooded! Dodgeball! (Part 1)
episodes.description: Episode 6 (2016) follows Saiki as he attempts to enjoy a peaceful day, only for unexpected psychic-related incidents to ruin his plans.

episodes.title: Hot-Blooded! Dodgeball! (Part 2)
episodes.description: Episode 7 (2016) follows Saiki as his attempts at normal school life are interrupted by increasingly strange and persistent classmates.

episodes.title: Reach Him! Sign of Love
episodes.description: Episode 8 (2016) follows Saiki as he uses his powers to quietly fix problems while making sure no one discovers the truth about him.

episodes.title: Saiki Family Home Renovation?! Drastic Makeover!!
episodes.description: Episode 9 (2016) follows Saiki as he is dragged into another bizarre situation involving his classmates’ misunderstandings and chaos.

episodes.title: Deceive! Mind Control
episodes.description: Episode 10 (2016) follows Saiki as he tries to avoid attention during school life, but his efforts only lead to more complications.

episodes.title: A Genius Magician?! Uryoku Chono
episodes.description: Episode 11 (2016) follows Saiki as he deals with over-the-top school events that make staying normal nearly impossible.

episodes.title: Second Encounter (on TV)! Uryoku Chono
episodes.description: Episode 12 (2016) follows Saiki as another chaotic school situation forces him to secretly use his psychic abilities again.

episodes.title: How Shady! Dark Reunion!
episodes.description: Episode 13 (2016) follows Saiki as he continues struggling to maintain a quiet life while his classmates create constant trouble.

episodes.title: Beachside Summer Story
episodes.description: Episode 14 (2016) follows Saiki as new problems arise, forcing him to carefully manage situations without exposing his powers.

episodes.title: A New School Term Starts! The Melancholy of Nendo
episodes.description: Episode 15 (2016) follows Saiki as he is pulled into more absurd events caused by his energetic classmates.

episodes.title: Please Make Me Your Apprentice!
episodes.description: Episode 16 (2016) follows Saiki as he tries to avoid involvement in school drama but inevitably gets dragged in anyway.

episodes.title: Psychic Medium in the Class Next Door
episodes.description: Episode 17 (2016) follows Saiki as he quietly solves problems behind the scenes while pretending to be ordinary.

episodes.title: Kineshi Hairo, in Search of Lumber
episodes.description: Episode 18 (2016) follows Saiki as another chaotic situation unfolds, challenging his goal of staying unnoticed.

episodes.title: Home Alone Disaster
episodes.description: Episode 19 (2016) follows Saiki as he deals with misunderstandings that escalate due to his classmates’ strange behavior.

episodes.title: Crisis in Three-Month Relationship
episodes.description: Episode 20 (2016) follows Saiki as he attempts to maintain peace during another unpredictable school day.

episodes.title: Escape Using an Invincible Suit of Camouflage!
episodes.description: Episode 21 (2016) follows Saiki as his normal life plans are once again interrupted by unexpected chaos.

episodes.title: Get Fired Up! PK Academy Sports Day (Part 1)
episodes.description: Episode 22 (2016) follows Saiki as he continues hiding his abilities while solving problems without being noticed.

episodes.title: Get Fired Up! PK Academy Sports Day (Part 2)
episodes.description: Episode 23 (2016) follows Saiki as situations spiral out of control, forcing him to intervene secretly.

episodes.title: Got Fired Up! PK Academy Sports Day (Part 3)
episodes.description: Episode 24 (2016) follows Saiki as another chaotic school experience wraps up, reinforcing his struggle to live a completely normal life.

tvshows.description: The Disastrous Life of Saiki K. (2016–2019) follows Kusuo Saiki, a high school student born with powerful psychic abilities, who tries to live a normal, quiet life while constantly dealing with bizarre classmates and uncontrollable supernatural problems.
